highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 2.88.6 refreshes HarfBuzz to 7.3.0, libwebp to 1.3.2 and libjpeg-turbo to 3.0.0.

bullets.detail: The bundled HarfBuzz jumps from the 2.x line to 7.3.0, picking up years of shaping fixes and new script coverage.
libwebp is bumped to 1.3.2 and libjpeg-turbo to 3.0.0, pulling in the current upstream security fixes.

bullets.lead: SIMD-less WASM builds restored for Safari and hardened Edge
bullets.detail: Restored a no-SIMD WASM build for browsers that still refuse SIMD — Safari and Edge with Enhanced Security enabled.
The unused `arm64e` architecture was dropped from Apple builds to keep binaries lean.

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 landed the HarfBuzz 7.3.0 bump, libjpeg-turbo 3.0.0 and libwebp 1.3.2, and the arm64e cleanup.

harfbuzz_summary: HarfBuzzSharp 7.3.0 pulls the bundled HarfBuzz forward from the 2.x line to 7.3.0, picking up years of shaping fixes and new script coverage.
